items.title: 'Homecoming': Critically endangered antelopes returned to Kenyan forests from Czech zoo
items.summary: Four mountain bongos have arrived in Kenya after being returned from a Czech zoo in a bid to bolster numbers of the critically endangered species of which there are less that 100 left in the wild. Kenyan officials hailed the return as a “homecoming of the majestic bongos".

items.title: France urges citizens to leave 'extremely volatile' Mali 'as soon as possible'
items.summary: France on Wednesday called on its citizens to leave Mali "as soon as possible" following weekend of attacks on government targets in cities across the country launched by jihadists and Tuareg separatists.

items.title: From the oceans into our bodies: Plastic pollution 'associated with obesity and dementia'
items.summary: François Picard is pleased to welcome Merijn Tinga, a biologist, artist and activist affectionately known as the Plastic Soup Surfer. He joins us, not only as a scientist or activist, but as someone who spends hours a day on the water, experiencing directly the forces we so often abstract away. From the surfboard, everything becomes clear: "You become one with the wind, with the waves… you have one focus." And yet back on land, "you're immersed by this throwaway culture".

As a researcher of global security and political dynamics, his analysis of Mali’s evolving crisis focuses on the interplay between militarised governance, external partnerships, and the persistence of insurgent violence in the Sahel. items.title: Champions League: PSG come out on top in legendary game against Bayern Munich
items.summary: Paris Saint-Germain beat Bayern Munich 5-4 in the first leg of the Champions League semi-final. With nine goals, it was the highest-scoring Champions League semi-final in history.

items.title: France investigates return of adult website linked to Pelicot mass-rape trial
items.summary: French prosecutors are investigating the reopening of the adult website Coco, now renamed Cocoland, on which sex criminal Dominique Pelicot used a chatroom to find dozens of strangers to rape his sedated wife Gisèle Pelicot. The platform has also been linked to crimes including the sexual abuse of children and murder.

items.title: 'You'd be speaking French': King Charles pokes fun at Trump during state dinner
items.summary: Britain's King Charles III used his speech at a state dinner at the White House on Tuesday to poke fun at US President Donald Trump who, in January, told European leaders that without US aid in World War II they would be speaking German. "Dare I say that, if it wasn't for us, you'd be speaking French," Charles quipped.

items.title: Europe hit by record heat, glacier loss and marine extremes per climate report
items.summary: Europe recorded its hottest year yet in 2025, with unprecedented heatwaves stretching from the Mediterranean to the Arctic, rapid glacier melt, record sea temperatures and expanding wildfires, according to a major climate report warning that the continent is warming twice as fast as the global average.

items.title: Middle East war live: Trump says Iran has been 'militarily defeated' at state dinner
items.summary: US President Donald Trump told Britain's King Charles III and other guests at a state dinner Tuesday that Iran has been "militarily defeated", in his first public comments on the sensitive topic during the ongoing royal visit. Follow our liveblog for the latest developments.

items.title: Middle East peace talks stall amid Hormuz tensions, ceasefire violations in Lebanon
items.summary: Efforts to revive talks over the Middle East war have stalled as the US weighs Iran’s latest proposal on reopening the Strait of Hormuz, a key oil route, while tensions in Lebanon continue to escalate despite a fragile ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah.

translation.title: France recommends that its nationals leave Mali "as soon as possible"
translation.summary: The French Ministry of Foreign Affairs recommended that its nationals leave Mali "as soon as possible" a few days after the coordinated attacks by jihadist and independent groups.

items.title: Marc Fesneau (MoDem) : "Le rapport est à charge contre l'audiovisuel public"
items.summary: Une majorité de députés ont voté pour la publication du rapport sur l’audiovisuel public rédigé par le rapporteur de la commission d’enquête Charles Alloncle, député UDR. Le MoDem s’est abstenu et Marc Fesneau, président du groupe Les Démocrates à l’Assemblée nationale, déplore un "rapport à charge". Mais il estime que sa publication va permettre de "combattre les idées de Charles Alloncle".

translation.title: Marc Fesneau (MoDem): "The report is against public broadcasting"
translation.summary: A majority of Members voted in favour of the publication of the report on public audiovisual media drawn up by the rapporteur of the committee of inquiry Charles Alloncle, MP UDR. MoDem abstained and Marc Fesneau, president of the Democratic Group in the National Assembly, deplores a "charge report". But he believes that his publication will "combat Charles Alloncle's ideas".

items.title: Affaire Pelicot, guet-apens homophobes : le site Coco fait son retour et devient Cocoland
items.summary: Coco, rebaptisée Cocoland, est de nouveau dans le viseur des autorités, qui enquêtent sur la réapparition de cette plateforme fermée par la justice en 2024. Elle est soupçonnée d’avoir servi de vecteur à des agressions sexuelles – notamment dans l’affaire Pelicot – ainsi qu’à des guet-apens homophobes.

translation.title: Pelicot case, homophobic watch-apens: Coco site returns and becomes Cocoland
translation.summary: Coco, renamed Cocoland, is again in the sights of the authorities, who are investigating the reappearance of this platform closed by the courts in 2024. It is suspected of having been used as a vector for sexual assaults – notably in the Pelicot case – as well as for homophobic lookouts.

items.title: Les Émirats arabes unis annoncent leur retrait surprise de l'Opep
items.summary: Les Émirats arabes unis ont annoncé leur retrait surprise de l'Organisation des pays exportateurs de pétrole (Opep) au nom de "l'intérêt national". Un revers pour l'alliance et son leader, l'Arabie saoudite, déjà ébranlés par la guerre au Moyen-Orient. Au contraire, c'est une énorme victoire diplomatique pour les États-Unis.

translation.title: United Arab Emirates announces surprise withdrawal from Opep
translation.summary: The United Arab Emirates announced its surprise withdrawal from the Organization of Petroleum Exporting Countries (OPEC) on behalf of the "national interest". A setback for the alliance and its leader, Saudi Arabia, already shaken by the Middle East war. On the contrary, it is a huge diplomatic victory for the United States.

items.title: En France, qui a le droit de travailler le 1er-Mai ?
items.summary: Le 1er-Mai a occupé cette année le devant de la scène bien en amont de la fête du Travail, pour cause de débats sur un possible élargissement des possibilités de faire travailler des salariés ce jour-là. Rappel des règles en vigueur et ce qui pourrait changer.

translation.title: In France, who has the right to work the 1st May?
translation.summary: This year, the 1st May took the lead well ahead of the Labour Day, because of debates about a possible expansion of the possibilities of employing employees on that day. Reminder of current rules and what might change.

items.title: Ligue des champions : le PSG remporte un match de légende face au Bayern
items.summary: Le Paris Saint-Germain a battu le Bayern Munich (5-4) en demi-finale aller de la Ligue des champions. Avec neuf buts, c’est la demi-finale de C1 la plus prolifique de l’histoire du football.

translation.title: Champions League: PSG wins legendary match against Bayern
translation.summary: Paris Saint-Germain beat Bayern Munich (5-4) in the semifinal of the Champions League. With nine goals, this is the most prolific C1 semifinal in football history.

items.title: Sans les Britanniques, "vous parleriez français" : la revanche grinçante de Charles III face à Trump
items.summary: Alors que Donald Trump avait affirmé en janvier que sans le soutien des Américains durant la Seconde Guerre mondiale, les Européens parleraient allemand, le roi Charles III a rendu la monnaie de sa pièce au président américain, mardi, déclarant que sans les Britanniques, "[les Américains parleraient] français".

translation.title: Without the British, "you would speak French": Charles III's grim revenge against Trump
translation.summary: While Donald Trump had said in January that without the support of the Americans during the Second World War, Europeans would speak German, King Charles III returned the change of his coin to the American president on Tuesday, declaring that without the British, "the Americans would speak French".

items.title: "Visit Rwanda" : sous les crampons, la guerre
items.summary: À la Une de la presse, mercredi : la situation chaque jour plus précaire des Gazaouis, toujours confrontés aux bombardements israéliens, en dépit du "cessez-le-feu" ; la visite du roi Charles aux États-Unis ; l’histoire d’un jeune déserteur russe ; et le coup marketing inédit de "Visit Rwanda", sponsor des quatre demi-finalistes de la Ligue des champions – dont le PSG, vainqueur mardi soir du match aller face au Bayern au terme d’une rencontre époustouflante.

translation.title: "Visit Rwanda": under the crampons, war
translation.summary: Press coverage on Wednesday: the daily more precarious situation of the Gazans, still facing Israeli bombardments, despite the "ceasefire"; the visit of King Charles to the United States; The story of a young Russian deserter; and "Visit Rwanda"'s unreleased marketing coup, which sponsors the four semi-finalists of the Champions League – including the PSG, winner Tuesday night of the game going against Bayern at the end of a stunning encounter.

items.title: Vagues de chaleur, fonte des glaces : l'Europe cumule les épisodes climatiques extrêmes

translation.title: Liu Guo-jung, during Anhui's research, stressed that he was doing his best to seize the harvest of summer grains, and to secure the production base of autumn grains.

He stressed the need to follow up on the important statement of the Secretary-General of Xi on national food security and to ensure that the goal of food production for the whole year was fulfilled, in line with the deployment of the central party and the State Council, taking firm political responsibilities, holding up the summer harvest, and making every effort to seize the harvest of summer food. items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy-saving law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher and higher-quality energy efficiency, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress ' s Standing Committee on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to obtain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection took the form of a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which will be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi, Sichuan and Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing, among others. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a general nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot-checking and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving efforts in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with the law; other issues in the implementation of the law; and suggestions and recommendations for changes to the energy-saving law.
